-- Seller Verification Schema

-- 1. Create Zone Enum
DO $$ BEGIN
    CREATE TYPE public.abuja_zone AS ENUM (
        'Zone 1 (Gwarinpa & Life Camp)',
        'Zone 2 (Wuse & Utako)',
        'Zone 3 (Kubwa Central)',
        'Zone 4 (Lugbe & Apo)',
        'Zone 5 (Gwagwalada Districts)'
    );
EXCEPTION
    WHEN duplicate_object THEN null;
END $$;
